query:
SELECT u.email, u.name, u.role, u.password, c.name as clientName, o.name as orgName
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON u.clientId = c.id 
LEFT JOIN organizations o ON u.organizationId = o.id
WHERE c.name = 'SRV';
